sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: VLO 2025년 3분기 순이익 11억 달러, 정제 부문 영업이익 16억 달러로 강세

keyPoints.text: 2025년 3분기 순이익 11억 달러(EPS 3.53달러), 조정 순이익 11억 달러(EPS 3.66달러)를 기록했다. 전년 동기 순이익은 3억 7,100만 달러(EPS 1.16달러)였다.
주주환원은 13억 달러로, 배당금 3억 6,400만 달러와 자사주 매입을 포함한다.

riskChanges.text: 재생 디젤(DGD) 부문은 영업손실 2,800만 달러(전년 동기 영업이익 3,500만 달러)를 기록했다. 경영진은 글로벌 정제 마진 정상화 및 지역적 운영 변동성을 언급했다.

businessChanges.text: 정제 부문 영업이익 16억 달러(전년 동기 5억 6,500만 달러), 조정 영업이익 17억 달러(전년 동기 5억 6,800만 달러)로 대폭 개선됐다. 정제 처리량은 하루 310만 배럴로 97% 가동률을 기록했다.
에탄올 부문 영업이익 1억 8,300만 달러(전년 동기 1억 5,300만 달러), 생산량은 하루 460만 갤런이었다.
St. Charles FCC Unit 최적화 프로젝트는 2026년 하반기 가동 시작 예정으로 안내되었다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 영업현금흐름 19억 달러; 운전자본 영향(+3억 2,500만 달러) 및 DGD 파트너사(-8,600만 달러) 조정 후 조정 영업현금흐름은 16억 달러.
자본지출 4억 900만 달러, 자사주 매입 3억 8,200만 달러를 포함한 주주환원 13억 달러. 주주수익률은 27%.
3분기 배당금 지급 3억 6,400만 달러, 분기 배당 주당 1.14달러.
재생 디젤 판매량 하루 270만 갤런으로 전 분기 대비 감소했다.

watchItems.text: 재생 디젤(DGD) 부문이 영업손실 2,800만 달러로 전환된 점은 단기 리스크 요인이나, 에탄올 부문의 지속적인 이익 성장(1억 8,300만 달러)이 이를 일부 상쇄한다.
정제 부문이 전년 동기 대비 3배 이상 영업이익을 기록했으며, 97% 가동률 유지 속에 St. Charles FCC 최적화 완공이 향후 마진 개선의 추가 촉매가 될 전망이다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Valero Energy Reports Third Quarter 2025 Results • Reported net income attributable to Valero stockholders of $1.1 billion, or $3.53 per share • Reported adjusted net income attributable to Valero stockholders of $1.1 billion, or $3.66 per share • Returned $1.3 billion to stockholders through dividends and stock buybacks • The St. Charles FCC Unit optimization project is expected to begin operations in the second half of 2026 SAN ANTONIO, October 23, 2025 – Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO, “Valero”) today reported net income attributable to Valero stockholders of $1.1 billion, or $3.53 per share, for the third quarter of 2025, compared to net income of $364 million, or $1.14 per share, for the third quarter of 2024. Excluding the adjustments shown in the accompanying earnings release  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $364 million = 3억 6,400만 달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $3.53 = 3.53달러; $3.66 = 3.66달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; $364 = 364달러; $1.14 = 1.14달러.

for the third quarter of 2025, compared to $371 million, or $1.16 per share, for the third quarter of 2024. Refining The Refining segment reported operating income of $1.6 billion for the third quarter of 2025, compared to operating income of $565 million for the third quarter of 2024. Adjusted operating income was $1.7 billion for the third quarter of 2025, compared to $568 million for the third quarter of 2024. Refining throughput volumes averaged 3.1 million barrels per day in the third quarter of 2025. “We are pleased to report strong financial results for the third quarter, highlighting our long-standing track record of operational and commercial excellence,” said Lane Riggs, Valero’s Chairman,  Normalized numeric aliases: $371 million = 3억 7,100만 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $565 million = 5억 6,500만 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $568 million = 5억 6,800만 달러; 3.1 million = 310만 달러; $371 = 371달러; $1.16 = 1.16달러; $565 = 565달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러; $568 = 568달러; 97 percent = 97%.

last quarter’s record performance in the Gulf Coast.” Renewable Diesel The Renewable Diesel segment, which consists of the Diamond Green Diesel joint venture (DGD), reported an operating loss of $28 million for the third quarter of 2025, compared to 1 operating income of $35 million for the third quarter of 2024. Segment sales volumes averaged 2.7 million gallons per day in the third quarter of 2025. Ethanol The Ethanol segment reported $183 million of operating income for the third quarter of 2025, compared to $153 million for the third quarter of 2024. Ethanol production volumes averaged 4.6 million gallons per day in the third quarter of 2025, achieving record  Normalized numeric aliases: $28 million = 2,800만 달러; $35 million = 3,500만 달러; 2.7 million = 270만 달러; $183 million = 1억 8,300만 달러; $153 million = 1억 5,300만 달러; 4.6 million = 460만 달러; $246 million = 2억 4,600만 달러; $234 million = 2억 3,400만 달러; $35 = 35달러; $28 = 28달러; $183 = 183달러; $153 = 153달러; $246 = 246달러; $234 = 234달러.

was 27 percent. Investing and Financing Activities Net cash provided by operating activities was $1.9 billion in the third quarter of 2025. Included in this amount was a $325 million favorable impact from working capital and $86 million of adjusted net cash used in operating activities associated with the other joint venture member’s share of DGD. Excluding these items, adjusted net cash provided by operating activities was $1.6 billion in the third quarter of 2025. Capital investments totaled $409 million in the third quarter of 2025, of which $364 million was for sustaining the business, including costs for turnarounds, catalysts and regulatory compliance. Excluding capital  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.9 billion = 19억 달러; $325 million = 3억 2,500만 달러; $86 million = 8,600만 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $409 million = 4억 900만 달러; $364 million = 3억 6,400만 달러; $382 million = 3억 8,200만 달러; $1.9 = 1.9달러; $86 = 86달러; 27 percent = 27%; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $409 = 409달러; $364 = 364달러; $382 = 382달러.
